title: Request Targets, Host Authority, Proxy Trust, and Client Identity · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs request targets, host authority, proxy trust, and client identity from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the request authority and trusted-proxy decision record. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for request authority and trusted-proxy decision record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret method, url, originalUrl, path, protocol, secure, hostname, host, ip, ips, headers, route, params, query, body, and socket using server-side semantics.
Validate canonical host and port against configured authority before routing, link generation, cache keys, redirects, or tenant selection.
Configure trust proxy by explicit addresses or hop logic and derive client, protocol, and host only when every trusted hop overwrites forwarded fields.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Authority Redaction Evidence
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 8888 in a canary revision draining long-lived response streams. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to derive authority only across an explicit trusted-proxy and host allow-list boundary; preserve one tenant fairness invariant; then remove one trusted proxy hop and recompute authority from the socket boundary. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Record bounded route, request ID, trusted peer, and redacted target evidence without logging credentials, tokens, personal data, or unbounded query values.

Inspect the Authority Redaction Evidence trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Authority Redaction Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for record bounded route, request id, trusted peer, and redacted target evidence without logging credentials, tokens, personal data, or unbounded query values. For Node and Express server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Authority Redaction Evidence, keep Authority Redaction Evidence connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
